findings.description: PascalCase class names present in the s1 code content are missing from hints: `ProjectSearchForm` (used in `@InjectForm(form = ProjectSearchForm.class, ...)`), `HttpRequest` (method parameter), `ExecutionContext` (method parameter).
findings.source_evidence: Source action method: `public HttpResponse download(HttpRequest request, ExecutionContext context)` and `@InjectForm(form = ProjectSearchForm.class, prefix = "searchForm", name = "searchForm")`
